that work.
hero.subtext: Custom websites and web-based SaaS applications for startups, businesses, and independent professionals.

process.headline: How we work together
process.subtext: From the first call to ongoing operations — transparent and without surprises.

steps.title: First call
steps.description: We clarify requirements, goals, and constraints. No form — a real conversation.
responsibilities: Clarify requirements, goals, and project constraints together
Assess technical feasibility and rough project scope
No forms, no agency bureaucracy — a direct conversation

steps.title: Concept & proposal
steps.description: Clear project scope, realistic timeline, and a transparent quote with no hidden costs.
responsibilities: Detailed project scope and structured concept
Realistic timeline with clearly defined milestones
Transparent fixed-price quote — no hidden costs

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Structured build with regular updates. You see progress before it goes live.
responsibilities: Structured development in clearly defined phases
Feedback loops before the final go-live

steps.title: Launch & support
steps.description: Clean handover, go-live, and optional ongoing maintenance — so your project keeps running.
responsibilities: Clean handover of all credentials, documentation, and source code
Go-live support and final quality assurance
Optional maintenance, hosting, and ongoing care

references.headline: Selected projects
references.subtext: A selection of past work — each built from scratch, delivered on time.

projects.name: CityGlow
projects.description: CityGlow needed a launch presence before the app shipped. Built a high-energy Next.js marketing site with conversion-focused layout, animated sections, and app store deep links — ready on day one of launch.

projects.name: Jurifor
projects.description: A law firm with no digital presence needed to establish trust fast. Delivered a clean WordPress site with structured service pages, GDPR-compliant contact flow, and local SEO — live within three weeks.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtext: Still have questions? Just get in touch.

items.question: How long does it take until my website is finished?
items.answer: It depends on the scope. A simple website is often done in 2–4 weeks. More complex projects with custom functionality can take 6–10 weeks. During the concept phase, we define a realistic timeline together.

items.question: Can I have changes made later?
items.answer: Yes, of course. After launch I offer ongoing maintenance and adjustments on request. Minor changes can often be implemented quickly — just reach out.

items.question: How many revision rounds are included?
items.answer: Every project includes defined feedback rounds during the concept and development phases. Adjustments within the agreed scope are made at no extra charge. What matters is the right result — not how many rounds it takes to get there.

items.question: How much does a custom SaaS solution cost?
items.answer: The price depends on the scope of features, complexity, and timeline. I work with fixed-price quotes — no hidden costs. After a short initial call, you'll receive a concrete proposal.

items.question: Do I need to provide the content and copy myself?
items.answer: Not necessarily. You can provide existing texts and images, or I can help you structure the content during the concept phase. For larger copy needs I can recommend trusted copywriters.

items.question: What happens if the project scope changes?
items.answer: Small adjustments within the agreed scope are part of normal project work. If requirements change significantly, we discuss the impact on timeline and price transparently — no surprise invoices, always agreed in advance.

items.quote: Tobias built my website. What I particularly appreciated was his outstanding client focus. He truly understood my complex business model, and that is reflected in his work. Continued success!
items.name: Wolfgang Neßhold

services.headline: What I build for you
services.subtext: Four service areas — from the first idea to ongoing operation.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: No WordPress, no page builders — every website is built from scratch with fully custom code. That means maximum performance, clean architecture, and technical SEO at a level that off-the-shelf solutions simply can't match.

items.title: SaaS Solutions
items.description: Web-based applications tailored precisely to your business model. Client portals, dashboards, booking systems, or custom tools for process automation.

items.title: Branding & Graphics
items.description: Logos, color concepts, and graphics that work both digitally and in print. No trend-chasing — a visual identity that fits your brand and stands the test of time.

items.title: Hosting & Maintenance
items.description: Secure hosting, regular backups, and technical maintenance on request. Your project stays reachable, up to date, and protected.
